meta.title: Campaign & Trend
meta.desc: Historical scan results across hunt cycles. Visualizes candidate volume, promotion rates, and finding counts per plane over time. Chart/table toggle via ref+form pattern.

sqlite.query: SELECT run_date, plane, candidates_found, promoted, findings_validated, fp_killed FROM scan_history ORDER BY run_date, plane

SELECT run_date, SUM(candidates_found) as total_candidates, SUM(promoted) as total_promoted, SUM(findings_validated) as total_findings, SUM(fp_killed) as total_fp_killed, ROUND(SUM(promoted) * 1.0 / SUM(candidates_found) * 100, 1) as promotion_rate FROM scan_history GROUP BY run_date ORDER BY run_date

compute.expr: '**' & $string($count($distinct(fetched_sources.cycle_summary.run_date))) & '** hunt cycles  |  Latest promotion rate: **' & $string(fetched_sources.cycle_summary[-1].promotion_rate) & '%**  |  Total findings: **' & $string($sum(fetched_sources.cycle_summary.total_findings)) & '**'
